one_time_description: Fire loss at Lot 16 development ($1,687,886) partially offset by insurance proceeds ($264,336), net one-time loss of $1,423,550
economic_notes: Nation has investments in KFN Enterprises Ltd., Choxw Holdings Corp., and KFN Enterprises Limited Partnership (GBEs). KFN Enterprises LP has callable debt of $7,063,275 guaranteed by the First Nation up to $9,220,000. Revenue from management fees and services to related entities significant.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Fire at Lot 16 development on November 18, 2022 caused $1,687,886 write-down with $264,336 insurance proceeds recognized in year; additional $1,423,990 costs incurred post-year-end with $750,000 insurance reimbursed and $938,326 expected. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (KFN Enterprises Ltd., Choxw Holdings Corp., KFN Enterprises LP). First Nation guarantees up to $9,220,000 in BMO loans for KFN Enterprises LP ($7,063,275 drawn). No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. total_government_transfers estimated as sum of ISC + BC Housing + CMHC + BC First Nations Gaming + First Nations Health Authority + First Nations Education Steering Committee + FN Lands Management Resource Centre + Fortis BC + Fraser Health Authority + Government of Canada + New Relationship Trust + Province of BC; osr = total revenue minus government transfers. expenses_infrastructure = Capital Program $56,326 + Capital Fund $350,079.
